title: PianoCraft
description: PianoCraft is a mod that adds a playable piano to the game !
body:
### PianoCraft is a mod that adds a playable piano to the game !

This mod is perfect for both beginners and experienced musicians, and is fully compatible with multiplayer.

You can use either a **keyboard** or a **real MIDI device** to play the piano.

![PianoCraft GUI](https://i.imgur.com/jyWwztN.png)

### Crafting recipe

![Crafting recipe](https://i.imgur.com/W74hlw6.png)

***Please note that PianoCraft is currently in early development state and there are plans to add more features to enhance the mod***

*You can suggest features on the GitHub Issues page*
